name: vukkt-plugins
description: Plugins by Vuk Topalovic — currently token-warden, a measurement and selection layer that makes Claude Code subagents measurably cheaper over time.

plugins.name: token-warden
plugins.description: Measurement and selection layer for Claude Code subagents: records token cost per session, distills candidate efficiency rules from expensive runs, benchmarks them on golden task suites, and compiles only rules that earn their context rent into agent memory.
